titleStmt.title: SII 17.50: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 50. (A.R. No. 48 of 1904). KUḌATINI, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the platform in front of the Kumārasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1990, Sarvajit, Māgha, śu. 5, Thursday. The details correspond to 1168 A.D., January 18. The tithi ended at ·19 on the previous day. The Śaka year was current.

It records that the son, name lost, of the Gāvuṇḍa of Koṅkaṇagēri raised a shrine for god Ṛiṇamōchanadēva, consecrated the god therein and also made provision for the repairs and upkeep of the shrine. It further records that Habbimayya Sāvidēva made a gift of land to the same god. The record states that during the period Dandāsani Purushōttama-brahmachāri-arasar was ruling over the territorv.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayābhyudayaśca . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara
cāravē traiḷōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāyaśaṁbhavē . jayatyāniṣkṛtaṁviṣṇō

ḍita¨rṇiya janāvaḷige māḷkesukhasaṁpadamaṁ . svasti samadhigata paṁ
camahāśabda vratajapaniyamasaṁyuktaruṁ śrī kā¨rttikēyadēvata�na
mappa śrīmaddaṁḍāsani puruṣōttama brahmacāriya rasar rājaṁ
mire . svasti śrīmat śakanṛpava¨rṣada 1190 ttaneya sa¨rvajit saṁva
tsatada māgha śuddha paṁcami bṛhaspati vāradaṁdu koṁkaṇagēriya gu
�ḍana maga māḷa ·ṛṇamōcanadēva¨rgge Ā
māḍisi kaḷasa pratiṣṭaya samayadoḷ�ṁḍa sphuṭita jī
keyi mudiyagāvuṁḍa voṁdoḷ mattar 4 kaṁ 7
. teṁ 19 habbimeyana sāvidēvaṁ dēva¨rgge ba
ṟaṁ mūḍal daṭṭavoladoḷ mattar 5 Uda
kusuvana sēvuyiṁ moḍal kaga
diṁ teṁkal sirigāvuṁḍavoladoḷ dē
baḍagalu¨rjjita vanasimoḷ dē
basavoladoḷ dēva[¨rgge]
tamāna
Digital edition of SII 17.50 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
